info.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM - Learning Events
info.description:
Last Updated January 2026

You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM.

Whether you're experienced with or new to REST, use this guide to find what you need, including:

  • A quick start how-to that walks you through a simple request example.
  • Use cases that provide real-world solutions with code examples.
  • Detailed descriptions for each REST resource.
info.x-summary: Last Updated January 2026 You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: When this parameter is provided, the specified children are included in the resource payload (instead of just a link). The value of this query parameter is "all" or "". More than one child can be specified using comma as a separator. Example: ?expand=Employees,Localizations. Nested children can also be provided following the format "Child.NestedChild" (Example: ?expand=Employees.Managers). If a nested child is provided (Example: Employees.Managers), the missing children will be processed implicitly. For example, "?expand=Employees.Managers" is the same as "?expand=Employees,Employees.Managers" (which will expand Employees and Managers).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
This parameter filters the resource fields. Only the specified fields are returned, which means that if no fields are specified, no fields are returned (useful to get only the links). If an indirect child resource is provided (Example: Employees.Managers), the missing children will be processed implicitly. For example, "?fields=Employees.Managers:Empname" is the same as "?fields=;Employees:;Employees.Managers:Empname" (which will only return the "Empname" field for Managers). the value of this query parameter is a list of resource fields. The attribute can be a direct (Example: Employees) or indirect (Example: Employees.Managers) child. It cannot be combined with expand query parameter. If both are provided, only fields will be considered.

Format: ?fields=Attribute1,Attribute2

Format for fields in child resource: ?fields=Accessor1:Attribute1,Attribute2

parameters.name: onlyData
parameters.description: The resource item payload will be filtered in order to contain only data (no links section, for example).

parameters.name: links
parameters.description:
This parameter can be used to show only certain links while accessing a singular resource or a resource collection. The parameter value format is a comma-separated list of : <link_relation>

Example:
self,canonical

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: This parameter restricts the number of resources returned inside the resource collection. If the limit exceeds the resource count then the framework will only return the available resources.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Used to define the starting position of the resource collection. If offset exceeds the resource count then no resources are returned. Default value is 0.

parameters.name: totalResults
parameters.description: The resource collection representation will include the "estimated row count" when "?totalResults=true", otherwise the count is not included.  The default value is "false".

parameters.name: q
parameters.description:
This query parameter defines the where clause. The resource collection will be queried using the provided expressions. The value of this query parameter is one or more expressions. Example: ?q=Deptno>=10 and <= 30;Loc!=NY

Format: ?q=expression1;expression2

You can use these queryable attributes to filter this collection resource using the q query parameter:
  • eventCancelDate; string; Date when the event was canceled.
  • eventCancelReasonCode; string; Reason for canceling the event.
  • eventCapacityEnabled; string; Indicates whether the event capacity is enabled or not. Valid values are Y or N.
  • eventEndDate; string; End date for the event.
  • eventStartDate; string; Start date for the event.
  • eventTimezone; string; Time zone for the event.
  • eventTrainingSupplierNumber; string; Friendly number identifying the training supplier.
  • eventWaitlistEnabled; string; Indicates whether a waitlist is enabled or not. Valid values are Y or N.
  • eventWaitlistMaximumEnabled; string; Indicates whether a maximum capacity is enabled for the waitlist or not. Valid values are Y or N.
  • eventWaitlistRule; string; Determines who can add to the event waitlist, such as learners or managers.
  • eventWithdrawalPeriod; string; Indicates when a learner can withdraw from an event.
  • eventWithdrawalPeriodBefore; string; Relative date before which withdrawal can occur, such as event start date.
  • eventWithdrawalPeriodUOM; string; Unit of measure for the event withdrawal period, such as hours, days, or weeks.
  • eventWithdrawalPeriodUnits; integer; Number of units for the event withdrawal period.
  • learningItemApprovalRuleESS; string; Determines how approvals are configured for self-service enrollment.
  • learningItemApprovalRuleMSS; string; Determines how approvals are configured for manager enrollment.
  • learningItemAttributionType; string; Indicates who this learning item is attributed to. Valid values are ORA_PERSON or ORA_SPECIALIST.
  • learningItemAuthorPersonId; integer; Person identifier for the learning item author.
  • learningItemBusinessDriver; string; Business driver, such as Compliance or Self Development.
  • learningItemCatalogProfileId; integer; Unique identifier for the learning catalog profile.
  • learningItemCatalogProfileName; string; Name of the learning catalog profile.
  • learningItemCatalogProfileNumber; string; Number for the learning catalog profile.
  • learningItemCommunityOverridesVisibility; string; Indicates whether the learning item visibility can be overridden by a community. Valid values are Y or N.
  • learningItemCompletionCertificateEnabled; string; Indicates if a completion certificate is enabled or not. Valid values are Y or N.
  • learningItemCompletionCertificateFileName; string; File name of the completion certificate.
  • learningItemCompletionCertificateLink; string; Preview link for the completion certificate.
  • learningItemCompletionCertificateTitle; string; Title of the completion certificate.
  • learningItemCoordPersonId; integer; Person identifier for the learning item coordinator.
  • learningItemCoordPersonNumber; string; Person number of the learning item coordinator.
  • learningItemCoverArtHighRenditionLink; string; Link to the high rendition version of the learning cover art image.
  • learningItemCoverArtLowRenditionLink; string; Link to the low rendition version of the learning cover art image.
  • learningItemCoverArtMedRenditionLink; string; Link to the medium rendition version of the learning cover art image.
  • learningItemCreationDate; string; Date when the learning item was created.
  • learningItemDeletionReasonCode; string; Reason for deleting the learning item.
  • learningItemDescription; string; Plain text version of the long description of the learning item.
  • learningItemDetailsDeepLink; string; URL to open the learning item page directly from the browser.
  • learningItemDetailsEmbedLink; string; URL that can be used to embed the learning item page in other pages. It opens the isolated learning item page without the global tool bar on the top.
  • learningItemEnrollCondition; string; Indicates when a learner can enroll in this learning item.
  • learningItemEnrollmentEndDate; string; Date when the enrollment period ends.
  • learningItemEnrollmentStartDate; string; Date when the enrollment period begins.
  • learningItemEnrollmentVisibilityMSS; string; Indicates whether the enrollment details are visible to the line manager. Valid values are ORA_SHOW and ORA_HIDE. The default value is ORA_SHOW.
  • learningItemExcludeFromHistory; string; Indicates whether to exclude the learning from the transcript. Valid values are Y or N.
  • learningItemExpectedEffortInSeconds; number; Expected effort needed by the learner to complete the learning item.
  • learningItemFeatureEndDate; string; Date when the learning item stops being featured.
  • learningItemFeatureStartDate; string; Date when the learning item starts being featured.
  • learningItemId; integer; Learning item Id of the course.
  • learningItemLastModifiedDate; string; Date when the learning item was last modified.
  • learningItemLearnerDataCollectionTypeESS; string; Determines how the learner information is collected, such as questionnaire or form.
  • learningItemLearnerDataQuestionnaireCodeESS; string; Unique code for the questionnaire.
  • learningItemLearnerDataQuestionnaireNameESS; string; Name of the questionnaire.
  • learningItemLearningLevel; string; Learning level, such as Beginner, Moderate, or Advanced.
  • learningItemLearningPathOverridesVisibility; string; Indicates whether the learning item visibility can be overridden by a learning path. Valid values are Y or N.
  • learningItemMarkCompleteMSS; string; Indicates if the manager can mark an enrollment as complete. Possible values are Y or N. Default value is Y.
  • learningItemNotificationMessage; string; Notification message text sent to the learners.
  • learningItemNotificationPattern; string; Notification pattern, such as Default Notification Pattern.
  • learningItemNumber; string; User-friendly number identifying the learning item. It's a surrogate key which is shown in the UI.
  • learningItemParentId; integer; Learning item identifier for the parent.
  • learningItemParentNumber; string; Learning item number for the parent.
  • learningItemPreviewURL; string; URL used by the administrator to preview the learning item.
  • learningItemPublishEndDate; string; Date when the learning item stops being visible in the learning catalog.
  • learningItemPublishStartDate; string; Date when the learning item starts being visible in the learning catalog.
  • learningItemPublisher; string; Learning item publisher, such as Learning Department.
  • learningItemPublisherName; string; Name of the publisher of the learning item.
  • learningItemReactivationReasonCode; string; Reason for moving the inactive learning item to active status.
  • learningItemSelfEnrollmentURL; string; URL for the learner to self enroll
  • learningItemStatus; string; Status of the learning item.
  • learningItemStatusComment; string; Status change comment for the learning item.
  • learningItemTitle; string; Title of the learning item.
  • learningItemTrailerLink; string; URL to open the learning item trailer directly from the browser.
  • learningItemType; string; Type of learning item, such as video, online course, document, assessment, or observation checklist.
  • learningItemVisibility; string; Visibility of the learning item, such as Public or Secret.
  • learningItemWithdrawalRuleESS; string; Determines how the learner's assignment withdrawals are processed.
  • learningItemWithdrawalRuleMSS; string; Determines how the manager's assignment withdrawals are processed.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: This parameter orders a resource collection based on the specified fields.  The parameter value is a comma-separated string of attribute names, each optionally followed by a colon and "asc" or "desc".  Specify "asc" for ascending and "desc" for descending. The default value is "asc".  For example, ?orderBy=field1:asc,field2:desc

parameters.name: finder
parameters.description:
Used as a predefined finder to search the collection.

Format ?finder=<finderName>;<variableName>=<variableValue>,<variableName2>=<variableValue2>

The following are the available finder names and corresponding finder variables

  • PrimaryKey Finds all learning items that match the specified primary key criteria.
    Finder Variables
    • learningItemId; integer; Unique identifier for the learning item.
  • findByLearningItemNumber Finds all the learning items that match the specified learning item number.
    Finder Variables
    • SysEffectiveDate; object;
    • learningItemNumber; string; User-friendly number identifying the learning item. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

x-adf-finder-formats.description: Finds all learning items that match the specified primary key criteria.

parameters.name: effectiveDate
parameters.description: This query parameter is used to fetch resources which are effective dated as of the specified start date. The value of this query parameter is a string having a date in yyyy-MM-dd format

parameters.name: REST-Framework-Version
parameters.description: The protocol version between a REST client and service. If the client does not specify this header in the request the server will pick a default version for the API.

parameters.name: Metadata-Context
parameters.description: If the REST API supports runtime customizations, the shape of the service may change during runtime. The REST client may isolate itself from these changes or choose to interact with the latest version of the API by specifying this header. For example: Metadata-Context:sandbox="TrackEmployeeFeature".

parameters.name: Effective-Of
parameters.description: This header accepts a string value. The string is a semi-colon separated list of <parameter-name>=<parameter-value>. It is used to perform effective date range operations. The accepted parameters are RangeMode, RangeSpan, RangeStartDate, RangeEndDate, RangeStartSequence and RangeEndSequence. The parameter values are always strings. The possible values for RangeMode are SET_LOGICAL_START, SET_LOGICAL_END, END_DATE, SET_EFFECTIVE_START, SET_EFFECTIVE_END, REPLACE_CORRECTION, REPLACE_UPDATE, RECONCILE_CORRECTION, CORRECTION, RECONCILE_UPDATE, UPDATE, ZAP and DELETE_CHANGES. The possible values for RangeSpan are PHYSICAL_ROW_END_DATE and LOGICAL_ROW_END_DATE. The values for RangeStartDate and RangeEndDate have to be a string representation of a date in yyyy-MM-dd format. The value for RangeStartSequence and RangeEndSequence must be strings such that when parsed they yield positive integers.

default.description: The following table describes the default response for this task.

parameters.name: Upsert-Mode
parameters.description: Contains one of the following values: true or false. If true, the server performs an Upsert operation instead of a Create operation. During an Upsert operation, the server attempts to find an existing resource that matches the payload. If a match is found, the server updates the existing resource instead of creating a new one. If not found or false (default), the server performs a Create operation. Note that the Upsert operation isn't supported for date-effective REST resources.

parameters.name: learningEventsUniqID
parameters.description: This is the hash key of the attributes which make up the composite key for the Learning Events resource and used to uniquely identify an instance of Learning Events. The client should not generate the hash key value. Instead, the client should query on the Learning Events collection resource in order to navigate to a specific instance of Learning Events to get the hash key.

parameters.name: dependency
parameters.description:
This parameter specifies dependencies which are fields that are set before and rolled back after generating the response. Generally they are used to preview the effects of an attribute change. The fields specified in this parameter are always set in the resource instance in question. When a child resource collection is requested and the parameter is set, the fields will be set in the parent resource instance before generating the resource collection payload. The value of this query parameter is a set of dependency fields. Example: dependency=ProductId=2

Format: <attr1>=<val1>,<attr2>=<value2>

parameters.name: learningEventsUniqID
parameters.description: This is the hash key of the attributes which make up the composite key for the Learning Events resource and used to uniquely identify an instance of Learning Events. The client should not generate the hash key value. Instead, the client should query on the Learning Events collection resource in order to navigate to a specific instance of Learning Events to get the hash key.

parameters.name: REST-Framework-Version
parameters.description: The protocol version between a REST client and service. If the client does not specify this header in the request the server will pick a default version for the API.

parameters.name: Metadata-Context
parameters.description: If the REST API supports runtime customizations, the shape of the service may change during runtime. The REST client may isolate itself from these changes or choose to interact with the latest version of the API by specifying this header. For example: Metadata-Context:sandbox="TrackEmployeeFeature".

parameters.name: Effective-Of
parameters.description: This header accepts a string value. The string is a semi-colon separated list of <parameter-name>=<parameter-value>. It is used to perform effective date range operations. The accepted parameters are RangeMode, RangeSpan, RangeStartDate, RangeEndDate, RangeStartSequence and RangeEndSequence. The parameter values are always strings. The possible values for RangeMode are SET_LOGICAL_START, SET_LOGICAL_END, END_DATE, SET_EFFECTIVE_START, SET_EFFECTIVE_END, REPLACE_CORRECTION, REPLACE_UPDATE, RECONCILE_CORRECTION, CORRECTION, RECONCILE_UPDATE, UPDATE, ZAP and DELETE_CHANGES. The possible values for RangeSpan are PHYSICAL_ROW_END_DATE and LOGICAL_ROW_END_DATE. The values for RangeStartDate and RangeEndDate have to be a string representation of a date in yyyy-MM-dd format. The value for RangeStartSequence and RangeEndSequence must be strings such that when parsed they yield positive integers.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: The activities resources enumerate all the activities that make up the event. It can be used to add, edit, and delete multiple activities. An event needs to have at least one activity.

assets.title: Learning Content Assets
assets.description: The assets resource enumerates media items used to visually enhance the learning parent resource. Assets can be cover art images or trailers. Asset details include asset identifier, asset number, date the asset was added, asset type, and asset status.

dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV.

eventCancelDate.title: Event Cancel Date
eventCancelDate.description: Date when the event was canceled.

eventCapacityEnabled.title: Event Capacity Enabled
eventCapacityEnabled.description: Indicates whether the event capacity is enabled or not. Valid values are Y or N.

eventTrainingSupplierNumber.title: Event Supplier Number
eventTrainingSupplierNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the training supplier.

eventWaitlistEnabled.title: Event Waitlist Enabled
eventWaitlistEnabled.description: Indicates whether a waitlist is enabled or not. Valid values are Y or N.

eventWaitlistMaximum.title: Event Waitlist Maximum
eventWaitlistMaximum.description: Maximum number of learners allowed on the waitlist.

eventWaitlistMaximumEnabled.title: Event Waitlist Maximum Enabled
eventWaitlistMaximumEnabled.description: Indicates whether a maximum capacity is enabled for the waitlist or not. Valid values are Y or N.

eventWaitlistRule.title: Event Waitlist Rule
eventWaitlistRule.description: Determines who can add to the event waitlist, such as learners or managers.

eventWithdrawalPeriod.description: Indicates when a learner can withdraw from an event.

eventWithdrawalPeriodBefore.description: Relative date before which withdrawal can occur, such as event start date.

eventWithdrawalPeriodUOM.description: Unit of measure for the event withdrawal period, such as hours, days, or weeks.

eventWithdrawalPeriodUnits.description: Number of units for the event withdrawal period.

learnerFeedback.title: Learner Feedback
learnerFeedback.description: The learner feedback resource provides details of the learner feedback configuration, such as feedback type, questionnaire code, and questionnaire name.

learningItemApprovalRuleESS.description: Determines how approvals are configured for self-service enrollment.

learningItemApprovalRuleMSS.description: Determines how approvals are configured for manager enrollment.

learningItemAuthorDisplayName.title: Learning Author Display Name
learningItemAuthorDisplayName.description: Display name the learning item author.

learningItemAuthorPersonId.title: Learning Author Person ID
learningItemAuthorPersonId.description: Person identifier for the learning item author.

learningItemAuthorPersonNumber.title: Learning Author Person Number
learningItemAuthorPersonNumber.description: Person number of the learning item author.

learningItemAuthorType.title: Learning Author Type
learningItemAuthorType.description: Indicates who this learning item is attributed to. Valid values are ORA_PERSON or ORA_SPECIALIST.

learningItemBusinessDriver.title: Learning Business Driver
learningItemBusinessDriver.description: Business driver, such as Compliance or Self Development.

learningItemCatalogProfileId.title: Learning Catalog Profile ID
learningItemCatalogProfileId.description: Unique identifier for the learning catalog profile.

learningItemCatalogProfileNumber.title: Learning Catalog Profile Number
learningItemCatalogProfileNumber.description: Number for the learning catalog profile.

learningItemCommunityOverridesVisibility.title: Learning Community Override
learningItemCommunityOverridesVisibility.description: Indicates whether the learning item visibility can be overridden by a community. Valid values are Y or N.

learningItemCompletionCertificateEnabled.description: Indicates if a completion certificate is enabled or not. Valid values are Y or N.

learningItemCompletionCertificateFileNam.description: File name of the completion certificate.

learningItemCompletionCertificateLink.description: Preview link for the completion certificate.

learningItemCoordPersonId.title: Learning Coordinator Person ID
learningItemCoordPersonId.description: Person identifier for the learning item coordinator.

learningItemCoordPersonNumber.title: Learning Coordinator Person Number
learningItemCoordPersonNumber.description: Person number of the learning item coordinator.

learningItemDeletionReasonCode.title: Learning Deletion Reason Code
learningItemDeletionReasonCode.description: Reason for deleting the learning item.

learningItemDescription.title: Learning Description
learningItemDescription.description: Plain text version of the long description of the learning item.

learningItemEnrollCondition.description: Indicates when a learner can enroll in this learning item.

learningItemEnrollmentEndDate.description: Date when the enrollment period ends.

learningItemEnrollmentStartDate.description: Date when the enrollment period begins.

learningItemEnrollmentVisibilityMSS.description: Indicates whether the enrollment details are visible to the line manager. Valid values are ORA_SHOW and ORA_HIDE. The default value is ORA_SHOW.

learningItemExcludeFromHistory.title: Learning Exclude from History
learningItemExcludeFromHistory.description: Indicates whether to exclude the learning from the transcript. Valid values are Y or N.

learningItemExpectedEffortInSeconds.title: Learning Expected Effort
learningItemExpectedEffortInSeconds.description: Expected effort needed by the learner to complete the learning item.

learningItemFeatureEndDate.title: Learning Feature Start Date
learningItemFeatureEndDate.description: Date when the learning item stops being featured.

learningItemFeatureStartDate.title: Learning Feature End Date
learningItemFeatureStartDate.description: Date when the learning item starts being featured.

learningItemKeepCompletionsOnDelete.title: Learning Keep Completions on Delete
learningItemKeepCompletionsOnDelete.description: Indicates whether learning completions should persist when the learning item is deleted. Valid values are Y and N.

learningItemLearnerDataCollectionTypeESS.description: Determines how the learner information is collected, such as questionnaire or form.

learningItemLearningLevel.title: Learning Level
learningItemLearningLevel.description: Learning level, such as Beginner, Moderate, or Advanced.

learningItemLearningPathOverridesVisibil.title: Learning Path Override
learningItemLearningPathOverridesVisibil.description: Indicates whether the learning item visibility can be overridden by a learning path. Valid values are Y or N.

learningItemLongDescription.title: Learning Long Description
learningItemLongDescription.description: Long, rich text description of the learning item.

learningItemMarkCompleteMSS.description: Indicates if the manager can mark an enrollment as complete. Possible values are Y or N. Default value is Y.

learningItemNotificationMessage.description: Notification message text sent to the learners.

learningItemNotificationPattern.title: Learning Notification Pattern

learningItemNumber.description: User-friendly number identifying the learning item. It's a surrogate key which is shown in the UI.

learningItemPublishEndDate.title: Learning Publish End Date

learningItemPublishStartDate.title: Learning Publish Start Date
learningItemPublishStartDate.description: Date when the learning item starts being visible in the learning catalog.

learningItemPublisher.title: Learning Publisher
learningItemPublisher.description: Learning item publisher, such as Learning Department.

learningItemPublisherName.description: Name of the publisher of the learning item.

learningItemReactivationReasonCode.title: Learning Reactivation Reason Code
learningItemReactivationReasonCode.description: Reason for moving the inactive learning item to active status.

learningItemShortDescription.title: Learning Short Description
learningItemShortDescription.description: Short description of the learning item.

learningItemStatusComment.title: Learning Status Comment
learningItemStatusComment.description: Status change comment for the learning item.

learningItemSupportedLanguages.title: Learning Supported Languages

learningItemVisibility.title: Learning Visibility
learningItemVisibility.description: Visibility of the learning item, such as Public or Secret.

learningItemWithdrawalRuleESS.description: Determines how the learner's assignment withdrawals are processed.

learningItemWithdrawalRuleMSS.description: Determines how the manager's assignment withdrawals are processed.

messages.title: Messages

metrics.description: The metrics resource returns the metrics on the learning item, such as the number of current and future-dated enrollments, completion count, passed and failed counts, and recommendations count.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The relatedMaterials resource is used to add attachments to the learning parent resource, as well as to edit, view, and delete the attachments. Details include attached document ID, file name, file URL, file title, and description.

userActionHints.title: User Action Hints
userActionHints.description: The userActionHints resource provides hints for possible actions on its parent resource.

whereUsed.title: Where Used
whereUsed.description: The whereUsed resource provides details about the uses of a learning item in topics and learning communities.

activityType.title: Activity Type

adhocResources.title: Ad Hoc Resources

classroomDetails.title: Classrooms

classroomDisplayName.title: Classroom Title

completionRule.title: Completion Rule

completionType.description: Completion type for the activity, such as Mandatory or Optional.

expectedEffortInSeconds.title: Expected Efforts
expectedEffortInSeconds.description: Expected effort needed by the learner to complete the learning item.

instructorDetails.title: Instructors
